news.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX begins trading on the Nasdaq
news.summary: No description available. No description available for this model. For more information on this model, please visit: www.cruiseworld.com/cruisemodel.

news.title: SpaceX shares gain 17% as trading begins, valuing Elon Musk's rocket company at more than $2 trillion
news.summary: SpaceX shares soared on Friday as trading commenced on the Nasdaq. SpaceX shares soared as trading began on Friday. SpaceX will be the first private company to send a rocket into space.

news.title: Trump denies Iran's account of deal terms, decries new drone attack: 'Dishonorable people'
news.summary: "They better get their act together, and FAST!" President Donald Trump says of Iran. He announced that a deal would be finalized within days.

news.title: SpaceX’s Gwynne Shotwell had IPO doubts for years, now she has a message for investors
news.summary: Gwynne Shotwell is long Elon Musk's second-in-command at SpaceX. Shotwell spoke exclusively with CNBC ahead of her company's highly anticipated IPO.

news.title: Judge blocks DOJ 'anti-weaponization' fund for longer, wants guarantee it’s dead
news.summary: A judge gave Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche and Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent a week to submit a sworn declaration the DOJ fund was not going forward.

news.title: AMD is seen as a CPU stock — but it’s gaining ground here, too
news.summary: Wall Street is underestimating how much Meta will spend on AMD’s AI chips, a Citi analyst said. Citi: “We believe that Meta will be a major player in the AI chip market in the future.”

news.title: My company fired one manager and is doing an ‘organizational reshuffling.’ Am I in trouble?
news.summary: “They let go of a pretty high-up manager who they only hired a month ago,” says a former player. “They’re trying to get back on track.”

news.title: ‘This would be a one-time event’: How can I take extra money from my 401(k) without triggering higher Medicare premiums?
news.summary: “I generally withdraw money from my traditional 401(k) for projects, larger expenses and sometimes just to stay ahead on upcoming bills,” she says.

news.title: ‘It seems too good to be true’: At a steak-dinner retirement seminar, the guy said annuities can outperform the market. Is that true?
news.summary: “He claimed that fixed-rate annuities are the sparkly, rainbow-fairyland of investments,” the author says.

news.title: ‘I feel like he may be taking advantage of us’: Our adviser pushes annuities after we already said no. Do we fire him?
news.summary: “I feel like he may be taking advantage of us,” she says. “I’m not sure what to do.”
